text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Gold Ship's behavior seems odder than usual.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Top of the morning to you, Trainer! What a
beautiful day for training, wot wot. ♪

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
First up for the morn is a jolly round of incline
dashes. What better way to build up stamina? ♪
Haha!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Now, let us put our noses to the grindstone!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Oh, dear me! My legs have given up the ghost!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It appears all of those consecutive races have
taken their toll on Gold Ship. I'd better adjust her
race schedule a little...
